title: Ubiquiti UACC-Retrofit-PoE-2Wire PoE extender
description: A pair of extenders that allow you to extend PoE over twisted pair or coaxial cables. This solution is ideal for situations where replacing the original cabling is not an option. Each extender features a 1x 10/100 Mbit ETH port and a two-pin connector, which can be fitted with a terminal block or an coaxial adapter. Powering the extenders is handled via the PoE-IN port with PoE++ (50V DC, 1.2A), while on the other side, you get a PoE-OUT PoE+ output (48V DC, 0.6A).
